    J1sp0007 - Class in src
    This class use linear search to find the list of index of the target if it is occur in Array with random integer number

    MyArray - Class in src
    Array Management Class - This class manages array operations such as generating, displaying, and searching elements in array.

    R

    randomNumber(int, int) - Method in class src.MyArray

    runProgram() - Method in class src.LinearSearch
    Run the linear search program

    S

    search(int) - Method in class src.MyArray
    Search target method (use Linear Search) - Print all the index of the target that occur in Array with formatted string: "Found {target} at index: {list of returned index}"
